recommendations.title: Saint-Jacques… La Mecque
recommendations.overview: Three siblings who detest each other and hiking must complete together a pilgrimage to Santiago de Compostela in order to be eligible to inherit their mother's wealth.

recommendations.title: La Belle Verte
recommendations.overview: As part of an intergalactic coalition, a well-meaning space alien volunteers to bring a message of self-actualization and harmony with nature to the one planet rejected by all her peers as incorrigible: Earth.

recommendations.title: The Kid
recommendations.overview: A tramp cares for a boy after he's abandoned as a newborn by his mother. Later the mother has a change of heart and aches to be reunited with her son.

recommendations.title: Three Men and a Cradle

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Virgin Mountain
recommendations.overview: Fúsi finds comfort in the familiarity of his routines, until an involuntary dance class forces him to encounter the real world.

recommendations.title: JCVD

recommendations.title: Waiting for the Hearse

recommendations.title: Il bell'Antonio
